times

vllm.title: [Frontend] Fix typo in tool chat templates for llama3.2 and toolace
vllm.author: bjj
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Fix a stray r I noticed while debugging tool calling @mdepinet

vllm.title: [CI][V1] Fix passing `tokenizer` as kwarg to `validate_guidance_grammar`
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
llguidance.LLMatcher.validate_grammar no longer takes tokenizer as a keyword argument (not sure if this is a bug on their side), but this has caused V1 test to always break on main.
This PR fixes it.
tests/v1/entrypoints/llm/test_struct_output_generate.py ....

vllm.title: [Doc][Bugfix] Add missing EOF in k8s deploy doc
vllm.author: psschwei
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Signed-off-by: Paul S. Schweigert paul@paulschweigert.com
In "Deployment with CPUs" section, the PVC/Secret command was missing an EOF.

vllm.title: [Misc] Improve model redirect to accept json dictionary
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Following PR for #14116.
It's not very useful if the model redirection only accepts tab-separated values, because some IDEs like vscode will replace tab with four spaces for indent.
This PR allows using json file and space-separated table for model redirection.

Examples:
$ VLLM_MODEL_REDIRECT_PATH=

vllm.title: [Model] use AutoWeightsLoader for stablelm,starcoder2,zamba2
vllm.author: lengrongfu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Issue #15697


StablelmForCausalLM

$ python3 -m vllm.entrypoints.cli.main stabilityai/stablelm-3b-4e1t


Starcoder2ForCausalLM

$ python3 -m vllm.entrypoints.cli.main bigcode/starcoder2-3b


Zamba2ForCausalLM

$ python3 -m vllm.entrypoints.cli.main Zyphra/Zamba2-1.2B-instruct

vllm.title: [Bugfix] LoRA : Fix the order in which the kernels process LoRAs
vllm.author: varun-sundar-rabindranath
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #15979
This is a fix for a potential bug that may occur in the future. Thanks @Terranlee for the identifying the bug and suggesting a fix!

vllm.title: [Bugfix] add hf_token to EngineArgs
vllm.author: paolovic
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Added hf_token to EngineArgs. It stores True if just the flag and no value is given, it stores the value if the flag and value are given, and evaluates to None otherwise.
Also, it can be passed to LLM as an argument where it's forwarded in the __init__ to EngineArgs where it's stored as an attribute

vllm.title: [TPU] Update PyTorch/XLA
vllm.author: yaochengji
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This update can fix the performance degradation caused by the incorrect block sizes of the ragged attention kernel.

vllm.title: [V1][Minor] Optimize get_cached_block
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Minor optimizations

Avoid redundant dictionary lookups cached_block_hash_to_block[block_hash]
Avoid creating a list by using next

vllm.title: Fix requires-python
vllm.author: martinhoyer
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Previous <=3.12 would exclude micro versions, like 3.12.1.

vllm.title: [Metrics] Add bucket for `request_latency`, `time_to_first_token` and `time_per_output_token`
vllm.author: yankay
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The request_latency_buckets histogram is currently capped at 60 seconds. However, many requests to large language models can take significantly longer than this threshold. While p90 and p99 are commonly used to analyze latency distributions in histograms, the top bucket’s cap limits the accuracy of

vllm.title: [V1][Minor] Minor simplification for get_computed_blocks
vllm.author: WoosukKwon
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Early exit for the requests asking prompt_logprobs
If the last block is dropped, do not include it in prefix_cache_stats.queries.

vllm.title: [Misc] Update Mistral-3.1 example
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Update Mistral-3.1 example so people don't think that they always have to use Mistral format, even for quantized models

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Make dummy encoder prompt padding alternative and add missing warnings
vllm.author: Isotr0py
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #13929

This PR makes multimodal dummy encoder sequence padding alternative, because we still need padding to keep whisper working.
Add missing warnings messages for encoder dummy data

vllm.title: [CI] Set max transformers version for Ultravox model test
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt: We need to upgrade the transformers version to 4.51.0 so that Llama-4 can work in our nightly after #16113 is merged. However, Ultravox impl on huggingface is currently breaking on 4.51.0 from the standard model test, so this PR sets the max transformers version for this model to unblock other PRs.

vllm.title: doc: fix some typos in doc
vllm.author: yihong0618
